daily_summary.headline: Artemis II and Aurora Storms Highlight a Busy Day in Space

top_events.title: Artemis II Crewed Mission
top_events.description: The Artemis II mission is set to launch, marking the first crewed mission to the Moon in over 50 years as part of NASA's Artemis program.
top_events.action: Watch live on NASA's official channels.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A G2-level geomagnetic storm is predicted, offering a good chance to view auroras down to 60° latitude.
top_events.action: Check local weather and head to dark areas for the best views.

top_events.title: Tianlong-3 Demo Flight
top_events.description: The maiden flight of the Tianlong-3 rocket by Space Pioneer, a significant step for China's private space sector.
top_events.action: Follow updates from Space Pioneer for live coverage.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
